titleStmt.title: SII 41.288: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 288. (A.R. No. 504 of 1905.) Jambukēśvaram, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the third prākarā in the Jambukēśvara temple at Tiruvānaikāval.

summary.p: Stones damaged in several places. This states that one Oḷimati-uḍayāṉ Teṉkaraināṭṭuviḻupparaiyaṉ gave the kiḻippuṇai-tīṭṭu mentioning that he took money from the temple trustees and handed over the same to various persons towards the price of the lands that they had sold to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷśrīrājarājarājarāja = [Picture].tevaṟku maiyum peṟṟa vicākattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulācaṉi
ticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmikaḷukku Iṉṉāṭṭu Iṭaiyāṟṟu nāṭ ṉ teṉkaraināṭṭu viḻupparai vatu rājarājarājarāja = [Picture].vaḷanāṭṭu
ṟṟattuk kiḻpalāṟṟu Icaṇaikkuṟai talaikkuṟaiyil Ūravar ṇṭumā Araikkāṇikkum pramāṇattiṭṭu muṉ kuṭippaṟṟu
kaṭampaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Iṉiyāṉpeṟṟāṉ viṟṟa nilam Eṭṭumāvukkum pramāṇat ṇamuṭaiyāṉ yāmā kāṇikku pramāṇattil meṟpaṭṭa
nāṉūṟṟirupattañcum kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ Aṉumaṉamuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi nampiyum viṟṟukku Iraṇṭu māmuntirikaikkum pramā ṭāyirattirunūṟṟum pālaiuṭai
yāṉ perumāṉ kaṇṇaṉ viṟṟa nilam Oṉṟemākāṇi pramāṇattil meṟpaṭṭa kācu Iraṇṭāyirattorunūṟṟirupattañcum Āka pramāṇa kāle Irumāvaraiye Araik(ka)
kāṇi muntirikaikkum pramāṇattil meṟpaṭṭa kācu patiṉorāyiratteḻunnūṟṟi ṟupattoṉpatum Inta Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmikaḷ pakkal Inta pramāṇaṅkaḷāl me
ṟpaṭṭaperkaḷukku vāṅki kuṭuttu kiḻippuṇaittiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar Oḷimatiuṭaiyāṉ teṉkaraināṭ
ṭu viḻupparaiyaṉeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai Oḷimatiuṭaiyāṉ teṉkaraināṭṭu viḻupparaiyaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pūṇṭiuṭaiyāṉ periyāṉ pañcanativāṇaṉeḻuttu
ṇṭa nāṭṭuviḻupparaiyaṉ sayiñaikkum Ippaṭi Aṟivukkum Ivai kāḷaṅkuṭaiyāṉ micaṅkiḷināṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Iṉiyāṉ peṟṟāṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku
bālasikṣai paṇṇi Irukkum kañcāṟṟu vāsiṣṭaṉ Ātivarākapaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Itu kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ kaimmāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ivai pramateyam peruveṅka
kkuṭaiyāṉ Ulakaḷantacoḻa maḻanāṭṭu veḷāṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku Ivai māṟampāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ veṭṭumpaḷa
kuṭaiyāṉ(ka) kaṇakku koṭṭūruṭaiyā mpalakkūttaṉeḻuttu Itu pālaiyūr kiḻavaṉ
Digital edition of SII 41.288 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
